overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character starting at a street food stall under a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic neon-lit city, then walking through a commercial district with various pedestrians and storefronts. The scene features strong morning sunlight casting long shadows mixed with vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food stall under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter observing the street scene and nearby NPC

notable_agents.action: person in yellow tank top sitting at the table drinking

entered.detail: metal table with drinks and bottles in the immediate foreground
massive angled concrete support pillars for the elevated highway
futuristic blue-lit vending structure with glass panels
distant building facades with glowing neon signage

segments.scene_description: The player stands at an outdoor food stall under a massive concrete overpass, with a metal table and drinks in the foreground. A person in a yellow tank top sits nearby while the morning sun streams through the gaps in the overpass structure, illuminating the distant neon signs of the futuristic city.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza under massive concrete overpass

events.description: player character begins walking forward from the food stall into the open area
exits the semi-covered stall area into the open plaza under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking away from the food stall toward the open street under the overpass

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement showing a samurai character with a sword

segments.scene_description: The player walks away from the food stall into a wide open plaza beneath the massive concrete overpass. Strong morning sunlight illuminates the area as a large digital billboard displaying a samurai character becomes visible on the right. The concrete pillars shift to the left as the player moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and vending machines

events.description: entering busier commercial area with more pedestrians and shop fronts
passing close to green vending machine and shop fronts on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various shops and pedestrians in the commercial district

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket standing near the vending machine

entered.detail: vending machine with bright green neon lighting and Japanese text signage
storefronts with glowing neon signs and metal security shutters

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the commercial sidewalk, passing the large digital billboard and approaching neon-lit storefronts. A green vending machine with bright neon lighting appears on the left, while various pedestrians walk along the path. The massive concrete overpass pillars remain visible to the left as the player moves deeper into the commercial area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered street food stall into a bright, neon-lit commercial district. It begins under a massive concrete overpass where morning sunlight streams through structural gaps, illuminating a metal table and a person in a yellow tank top. As the camera moves away from the stall, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the concrete pillars shift to the left and a large digital billboard of a samurai character emerges on the right. The movement then carries the viewer along a commercial sidewalk, passing the billboard to approach vibrant storefronts and a glowing green vending machine. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the urban area, weaving past pedestrians while the towering overpass pillars recede into the background.
